formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period Apr 27 2025)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period Jan 26 2025)
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.note: From the SE statement: Net income 18775 minus dividends 244 minus share repurchases charged to retained earnings 14411 (the portion charged to retained earnings per SE statement context c-10) = 4120. Retained earnings went from 68038 to 72158, a change of 4120.

operating_leases.current_location: Hidden inside Accrued and other current liabilities per us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList = AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent; current amount of 300 disclosed in Note 8 accrued liabilities breakdown and Note 14 lease maturity table

components.label: Depreciation and amortization (CF statement single line)

depreciation_and_amortization.note: The CF statement presents one combined line. Note 7 discloses intangible amortization of 159M separately. Note 13 discloses segment D&A: Compute and Networking 296M, Graphics 109M for Q1 FY2026. These segment amounts total 405M and exclude acquisition-related intangible amortization allocated to All Other.

accounts_receivable.note: BS shows Accounts receivable, net as a standalone line. Note 8 discloses concentration percentages but no separate AR breakout.

capex.note: CF line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets = 1227M. Supplemental disclosure in Note 8: property, equipment and intangible assets acquired by assuming related liabilities = 408M (us-gaap:CapitalExpendituresIncurredButNotYetPaid). XBRL concept PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets used.

short_term_debt.note: No current portion of long-term debt on BS. Note 10 states commercial paper program of 575M with no outstanding balance. 3.20% Notes Due 2026 are classified as LongTermDebtNoncurrent on the BS (remaining term 1.4 years); no reclassification to current observed in XBRL data.

interest_expense.source: IS shows Interest expense of 63M (us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating) and Interest income of 515M (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest) as separate line items; gross interest expense is 63M per XBRL. MD&A states interest expense is comprised of coupon interest and debt discount amortization.

inventory.note: Inventory breakdown from Note 8: Raw materials 2525, Work in process 5339, Finished goods 3469, Total 11333. Inventory provision of 2.3B recorded in cost of revenue in Q1 FY2026 including 1.9B for H20 product inventory.

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales, general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other income (expense), net equals Total other income (expense), net
Operating income plus Total other income (expense), net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Investing inflows minus investing outflows equals Net cash used in investing activities
Financing inflows minus financing outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
Net cash provided by operating activities plus Net cash used in investing activities plus Net cash used in financing activities equals Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period plus Change in cash and cash equivalents equals Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
